properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v5 v10 v11 v12 v13 v14 v15 v16 v17 v18

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You got thunder in Your vocal, You got flames in Your eyes. You got wonder working power Pouring out of Your side.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Checked the tomb all the way through, The grave was empty inside. Ain't no other pull the greatest miracle of all time.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You got power, demons cower when they hear Your name called, You got power that still towers, Make Goliath look small.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You got power to devour any counterfeit roar, Even Your tongue is a sword, Count up the score.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: /: You are the Lord (Holy) You are the Lord (Holy) :/

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: All those funerals You ruined When You made the dead rise. Heaven's healer, Using spit and Mud to open blind eyes.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: You got wonders I can't number, Couldn't count if I tried. Called the doctor and the doctor said: "I'm giving new life".

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Tell your enemies the victory is already here. More than sixty thousand angels, It's just the tip of the spear.

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: One day, every knee will bow And every heart will be Yours. This is the end of a war, Count up the score.

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: How many enemies Ended on bended knees Swallowed up in defeat? Can't count 'em

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: How many raging seas Opened in front of me? How many victories? Can't count 'em

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: How many prophecies No one would dare believe? Now it's reality Can't count 'em

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: How many broken men Given a second chance? See all the lifted hands Can't count 'em

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: How many Thomases Doubted Your promises? Standing here now convinced Can't count 'em

verse.name: v15
verse.lines: How many hospitals Said it's impossible? How many miracles? Can't count 'em

verse.name: v16
verse.lines: How many paralyzed Living a different life Go on and testify? Can't count 'em

verse.name: v17
verse.lines: How many sinners saved? How many bodies raised? How many empty graves? Can't count 'em

verse.name: v18
verse.lines: /: You are the Lord (Holy) You are the Lord (Holy) :/
